reason_for_decision: The article clears the pass threshold with stronger coastal-specific trade-offs, clearer VTS context, and better operational evaluation criteria.
strengths: The article is grounded in real coastal constraints such as sea clutter, shoreline masking, and mixed target populations.
It makes the AIS-versus-radar distinction clearly enough to avoid a common conceptual error.
The closing performance section improves decision value by focusing attention on constrained waters instead of nominal open-water range.
summary_assessment: This version is strong enough to pass. It is narrower, more maritime-aware, and more operationally useful than a generic radar deployment article.
